proved: run planning is deterministic, candidate-blinded, order-swapped, and compute-matched
candidate and judge artifacts containing provider/model/slot identity fail closed
each blinded candidate output and critique is required exactly once
every claim requires a unique evidence audit against known source snapshots
both judgments must use the planned blinded orders and complete rankings
supported minority findings cannot be silently rejected or omitted from synthesis metadata
actual adversarial and baseline call counts must equal the same planned budget
token counts must be non-negative integers and cost finite/non-negative
shared mutation requires accepted human review plus proposal and revision identity
notProved: provider orchestration, cancellation, failure, retry, or per-call provenance
human preference, confidence intervals, cost advantage, or panel superiority
public JSON-schema validation of untyped run records
